description_long: This object is a halved orange with a smooth, slightly glossy yellow-orange rind encasing the fruit. The cut surface reveals a vibrant, segmented interior with a pale central core and radiating sections of juicy, translucent orange flesh. The rind is thick and slightly dimpled, with a matte finish on the exterior and a more fibrous, lighter-colored pith just beneath the surface. The interior segments are tightly packed, each separated by thin, white membranes, and the flesh appears moist and succulent. The coloration transitions from a deeper orange at the center to a lighter, almost yellow hue near the rind. The overall form is a rounded half-sphere, typical of a freshly cut orange.
description: A halved orange with a smooth yellow-orange rind and a juicy, segmented orange interior. The cut surface displays vibrant, moist flesh and a thick, dimpled rind.
description_view_0: The view shows the smooth, curved exterior rind of the orange, with no interior visible.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the rounded rind, showing subtle dimpling and a matte finish, still with no interior exposed.
description_view_2: The cut surface is fully visible, displaying the segmented, juicy orange flesh and the pale central core.
description_view_3: A slightly rotated view of the cut surface, emphasizing the radiating segments and the thick rind around the edge.
attribute_location_or_placement: outdoor market stall, park bench, sidewalk vendor cart
